/*
 * FUSION: GPU SAT SOLVER KERNEL
 * -----------------------------
 * This kernel implements parallel Unit Propagation for boolean satisfiability problems.
 * It is designed to ingest flattened CNF (Conjunctive Normal Form) clauses representing
 * dependency constraints and determine validity in parallel.
 * * COMPILE: nvcc -O3 -ptx cuda_sat_kernel.cu -o kernel.ptx
 */

#include <cuda_runtime.h>
#include <device_launch_parameters.h>
#include <stdio.h>

#define THREADS_PER_BLOCK 256
#define MAX_VARS 10000

// Flattened representation of dependency clauses
// Clauses are stored in a 1D array separated by 0
// e.g., (A OR B) AND (NOT A OR C) -> [1, 2, 0, -1, 3, 0]
struct Formula {
    int* clauses;
    int length;
    int num_vars;
};

// State of variables: 0 = unassigned, 1 = true, -1 = false
__global__ void unit_propagation_kernel(
    const int* __restrict__ clauses, 
    const int* __restrict__ clause_indices,
    int num_clauses,
    int* __restrict__ assignment, 
    int* __restrict__ changed_flag
) {
    int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;

    if (idx >= num_clauses) return;

    // Retrieve clause boundaries
    int start = clause_indices[idx];
    int end = clause_indices[idx+1];

    int unassigned_count = 0;
    int last_unassigned_literal = 0;
    bool already_satisfied = false;

    // Check literals in this clause
    for (int i = start; i < end; i++) {
        int lit = clauses[i];
        int var_idx = abs(lit) - 1;
        int val = assignment[var_idx];
        
        // If lit > 0, we need val == 1. If lit < 0, we need val == -1.
        bool is_true = (lit > 0 && val == 1) || (lit < 0 && val == -1);
        
        if (is_true) {
            already_satisfied = true;
            break;
        }

        if (val == 0) {
            unassigned_count++;
            last_unassigned_literal = lit;
        }
    }

    // Unit Propagation Logic
    // If a clause is unsatisfied and has exactly one unassigned literal,
    // that literal MUST be assigned to make the clause true.
    if (!already_satisfied && unassigned_count == 1) {
        int var_idx = abs(last_unassigned_literal) - 1;
        int new_val = (last_unassigned_literal > 0) ? 1 : -1;
        
        // Atomic compare-and-swap to avoid race conditions if multiple clauses imply same var
        int old = atomicCAS(&assignment[var_idx], 0, new_val);
        
        if (old == 0) {
            *changed_flag = 1; // Signal that we made progress
        } else if (old != new_val) {
            // Conflict detected! (Variable implied True by one clause and False by another)
            // In a real solver, this triggers backtracking/learning.
            // For Fusion, we flag error state -2.
            *changed_flag = -2; 
        }
    }
}

extern "C" {
    // Host function to launch kernel
    void solve_dependency_constraints(
        int* h_clauses, 
        int* h_indices, 
        int num_clauses, 
        int num_vars, 
        int* h_result
    ) {
        int *d_clauses, *d_indices, *d_assignment, *d_changed;
        int h_changed = 1;
        
        // Allocate Device Memory
        cudaMalloc(&d_clauses, sizeof(int) * /*total_literals*/ 100000); // Dynamic in real impl
        cudaMalloc(&d_indices, sizeof(int) * (num_clauses + 1));
        cudaMalloc(&d_assignment, sizeof(int) * num_vars);
        cudaMalloc(&d_changed, sizeof(int));

        // Copy Data
        cudaMemcpy(d_clauses, h_clauses, sizeof(int) * 100000, cudaMemcpyHostToDevice);
        cudaMemcpy(d_indices, h_indices, sizeof(int) * (num_clauses + 1), cudaMemcpyHostToDevice);
        cudaMemset(d_assignment, 0, sizeof(int) * num_vars);

        // Iterative Propagation (BCP Loop)
        while (h_changed == 1) {
            h_changed = 0;
            cudaMemcpy(d_changed, &h_changed, sizeof(int), cudaMemcpyHostToDevice);

            int blocks = (num_clauses + THREADS_PER_BLOCK - 1) / THREADS_PER_BLOCK;
            unit_propagation_kernel<<<blocks, THREADS_PER_BLOCK>>>(
                d_clauses, d_indices, num_clauses, d_assignment, d_changed
            );

            cudaMemcpy(&h_changed, d_changed, sizeof(int), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);
            
            if (h_changed == -2) {
                printf("FUSION KERNEL: Dependency Conflict Detected on GPU.\n");
                break;
            }
        }

        // Retrieve Result
        cudaMemcpy(h_result, d_assignment, sizeof(int) * num_vars, cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);

        // Cleanup
        cudaFree(d_clauses);
        cudaFree(d_indices);
        cudaFree(d_assignment);
        cudaFree(d_changed);
    }
}
